name: LobsterSight
description: Task tracking integration with LobsterSight. Lets the agent manage tasks, track progress, and report status to users via a real-time dashboard.

apiUrl.description: Override the default LobsterSight agent API base URL. Only needed for self-hosted instances.

injectOpenTasks.description: Inject open tasks into agent context before each run

maxInjectedTasks.description: Maximum number of open tasks to inject into context

agentProjectId.description: Project UUID for the agent's own tasks. The agent acts autonomously on tasks in this project. Tasks in other projects belong to the user and require explicit instructions.

apiUrl.label: API URL
apiUrl.help: Override for self-hosted instances. Uses the default LobsterSight API if not set.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Bearer token for agent authentication (starts with ls_)

injectOpenTasks.label: Inject Open Tasks
injectOpenTasks.help: Automatically show open tasks in the agent's context each conversation

maxInjectedTasks.label: Max Injected Tasks
maxInjectedTasks.help: Limit how many open tasks are shown in context

agentProjectId.label: Agent Project
agentProjectId.help: The project UUID the agent owns. It can freely act on tasks here. For all other projects, it only acts when asked.
